equipment_categories.name: Audio & Sound
equipment_categories.description: Speakers, PA systems, mixers, microphones, and complete audio setups for events of any size.

equipment_categories.name: Seating & Chairs
equipment_categories.description: Folding chairs, banquet chairs, bar stools, and lounge seating for weddings, conferences, and parties.

equipment_categories.name: Tables
equipment_categories.description: Round, rectangular, and cocktail tables suitable for dining, displays, and registration areas.

equipment_categories.name: Stages & Platforms
equipment_categories.description: Modular stage decks, risers, and platforms for performances, presentations, and head tables.

equipment_categories.name: Lighting & Effects
equipment_categories.description: Uplighting, spotlights, party lights, and special effects to transform your event atmosphere.

venues.name: Downtown Austin Conference Center – Room A
venues.short_description: Modern conference room in downtown Austin with full A/V and flexible seating.
venues.long_description: Room A at the Downtown Austin Conference Center is ideal for mid-sized meetings, seminars, and training sessions. The space includes built-in projection, sound system, whiteboards, and flexible seating layouts. On-site staff can assist with setup and basic A/V support.
venues.cancellation_policy_description: Free cancellation up to 72 hours before the event start time. 50% fee for cancellations within 72 hours.

venues.name: Downtown Austin Conference Center – Room B
venues.short_description: Larger conference room with dual projectors and breakout space.
venues.long_description: Room B offers a spacious layout with dual HD projectors, ceiling-mounted speakers, and an adjacent breakout area. Perfect for conferences, panels, and hybrid meetings with remote attendees.
venues.cancellation_policy_description: Free cancellation up to 7 days before event date. 25% fee within 7 days, 75% within 48 hours.

venues.name: TechPark Meeting Hub – Conference Suite
venues.short_description: Flexible tech-enabled conference suite in North Austin.
venues.long_description: The TechPark Conference Suite features modular furniture, large-format display, and conference cameras for hybrid events. Ideal for strategy sessions, workshops, and offsites.
venues.cancellation_policy_description: Full refund for cancellations within 24 hours of booking. After that, 50% refund up to 5 days before event date.

venues.name: Riverfront Conference Center – Oak Room
venues.short_description: Conference room with river views and natural light.
venues.long_description: The Oak Room combines floor-to-ceiling windows with blackout shades, making it suitable for both presentations and workshops. Located along the riverfront with easy access to downtown hotels.
venues.cancellation_policy_description: Free cancellation up to 5 days before the event. 50% fee within 5 days, no refund within 24 hours.

venues.name: Galleria Executive Boardroom
venues.short_description: Premium boardroom near the Houston Galleria.
venues.long_description: A polished executive boardroom featuring leather seating, integrated conferencing, and on-demand catering. Ideal for leadership meetings and client presentations.
venues.cancellation_policy_description: Free cancellation up to 48 hours before the event start time.

venues.name: Lakeside Wedding Pavilion
venues.short_description: Romantic lakeside pavilion with gazebo and garden ceremony space.
venues.long_description: The Lakeside Wedding Pavilion offers a picturesque outdoor ceremony site, covered reception pavilion, and landscaped gardens perfect for photos. String lighting and basic sound system are included, with options to add decor, staging, and upgraded lighting.
venues.cancellation_policy_description: Non-refundable deposit. Remaining balance refundable up to 30 days before event date.

venues.name: Hill Country Vineyards Estate
venues.short_description: Scenic vineyard venue with indoor hall and outdoor terrace.
venues.long_description: Overlooking rolling vineyards, this estate features an elegant indoor reception hall, barrel room for cocktail hours, and a sunset terrace for ceremonies. On-site coordination and preferred vendor list available.
venues.cancellation_policy_description: Date can be rescheduled once up to 6 months before event. Cancellations are subject to a 40% fee.

venues.name: Skyline Ballroom
venues.short_description: Downtown ballroom with city skyline views and full A/V.
venues.long_description: The Skyline Ballroom sits on the top floor of a downtown tower, with panoramic views and customizable lighting. Ideal for weddings, galas, and large corporate events. Packages available with catering, staging, and decor.
venues.cancellation_policy_description: Free cancellation within 14 days of booking if event is more than 90 days away. Standard 30% cancellation fee otherwise.

venues.name: Garden Courtyard Events
venues.short_description: Charming garden courtyard for intimate weddings and parties.
venues.long_description: A hidden courtyard with lush greenery, bistro lighting, and a small stage area. Perfect for intimate weddings, rehearsal dinners, and milestone celebrations.
venues.cancellation_policy_description: 50% non-refundable deposit. Remaining balance refundable up to 21 days before event.

venues.name: Warehouse Loft Event Space
venues.short_description: Industrial-chic loft adaptable for weddings and corporate events.
venues.long_description: An open-plan warehouse loft with exposed brick, high ceilings, and customizable layout. Bring your own vendors or work with our preferred partners for decor, staging, and production.
venues.cancellation_policy_description: Free cancellation up to 30 days prior. 25% fee within 30 days, 75% within 7 days.

venues.name: Suburban Community Hall
venues.short_description: Budget-friendly hall suitable for birthdays, showers, and small weddings.
venues.long_description: A simple, flexible community hall with tables and chairs included. Perfect for DIY hosts who want to bring their own decor, catering, and entertainment.
venues.cancellation_policy_description: Full refund for cancellations 14+ days before event. 50% refund within 14 days.

venues.name: University Auditorium
venues.short_description: Large auditorium with fixed seating and full stage lighting.
venues.long_description: A classic auditorium with tiered seating, full stage, backstage dressing rooms, and advanced lighting. Ideal for conferences, performances, and keynote sessions.
venues.cancellation_policy_description: Bookings are non-refundable but may be rescheduled subject to availability.

venues.name: Rooftop Terrace – Dallas
venues.short_description: Open-air rooftop for cocktail receptions and micro-weddings.
venues.long_description: A stylish rooftop terrace with city views, bar area, and lounge seating. Works well for cocktail receptions, micro-weddings, and networking events.
venues.cancellation_policy_description: Free cancellation for weather-related rescheduling up to 24 hours before event.

venues.name: Old Town Banquet Hall (Closed)
venues.short_description: Former banquet hall no longer accepting bookings.
venues.long_description: This venue has been retired from active listings and is kept only for historical booking records.
venues.cancellation_policy_description: No longer applicable. Venue is inactive.

equipment_items.name: Compact Bluetooth PA System
equipment_items.short_description: Portable 2-speaker PA with mixer and wireless mic for up to 75 guests.
equipment_items.long_description: This compact PA system includes two powered speakers, a small mixer with Bluetooth connectivity, and one wireless handheld microphone. Ideal for speeches, background music, and small parties up to 75 guests. Easy to transport and set up in under 10 minutes.

equipment_items.name: Standard Event PA System (2x12" Speakers)
equipment_items.short_description: Full PA with mixer and two 12" speakers for events up to 150 guests.
equipment_items.long_description: A versatile PA package including two 12" powered speakers, a 6-channel analog mixer, stands, and all necessary cables. Suitable for wedding receptions, corporate presentations, and live DJs for crowds up to 150 people.

equipment_items.name: Premium Event Audio Package (4 Speakers)
equipment_items.short_description: High-output audio package with subwoofer for large events.
equipment_items.long_description: Designed for larger weddings, concerts, and festivals, this premium package includes four 15" speakers, a pair of subwoofers, a 12-channel mixer, and basic stage cabling. Recommended for crowds up to 350 guests.

equipment_items.name: Standard HD Projector (3500 Lumens)
equipment_items.short_description: 1080p projector suitable for screens up to 120".
equipment_items.long_description: A reliable 1080p projector with 3500 lumens of brightness, perfect for presentations, slideshows, and movies in dim to moderately lit rooms. Includes HDMI and VGA inputs and a carrying case.

equipment_items.name: Bright HD Projector (4500 Lumens)
equipment_items.short_description: High-brightness 1080p projector for rooms with ambient light.
equipment_items.long_description: This bright 4500-lumen 1080p projector is ideal for conference rooms and event spaces where you can't fully darken the room. Delivers sharp images on screens up to 150". HDMI cable and remote included.

equipment_items.name: Large-Venue Projector (6000 Lumens)
equipment_items.short_description: High-output projector for large screens and ballrooms.
equipment_items.long_description: A professional-grade 6000-lumen projector designed for large venues, ballroom stages, and outdoor evening screenings. Works best with 16:9 fast-fold screens and professional A/V support.

equipment_items.name: White Resin Folding Chair
equipment_items.short_description: Classic white resin folding chair with padded seat.
equipment_items.long_description: A popular choice for weddings and ceremonies, this white resin folding chair includes a comfortable padded seat. Rated for indoor and outdoor use and supports up to 300 lbs.

equipment_items.name: Black Metal Folding Chair
equipment_items.short_description: Durable metal folding chair for casual events.
equipment_items.long_description: Budget-friendly metal folding chair with a contoured plastic seat and back. Great for conferences, community events, and extra seating at parties.

equipment_items.name: 60" Round Banquet Table
equipment_items.long_description: Commercial-grade 60" (5-foot) round banquet table with folding legs. Seats 8 guests comfortably and fits standard 120" round linens. Ideal for weddings and banquets.

equipment_items.name: 72" Round Banquet Table
equipment_items.short_description: 72" round table seating up to 10 guests.
equipment_items.long_description: Large 72" (6-foot) round banquet table ideal for head tables or maximizing seating. Seats 10 guests and pairs with 132" linens for floor-length coverage.

equipment_items.name: 6-Foot Rectangular Banquet Table
equipment_items.long_description: Versatile 6-foot rectangular banquet table with folding legs. Seats 6–8 guests depending on layout and is commonly used for buffets, registration, and vendor displays.

equipment_items.name: 4x8 Modular Stage Deck
equipment_items.long_description: Heavy-duty 4x8-foot modular stage deck with adjustable legs (16–24" heights). Multiple decks can be connected to create larger stages for bands, presentations, and head tables.

equipment_items.name: 8x12 Portable Stage Platform
equipment_items.short_description: Pre-configured 8x12-foot stage suitable for small bands and panels.
equipment_items.long_description: An 8x12-foot stage assembled from modular decks, including skirting and steps. Great for wedding head tables, panel discussions, and small music performances.

equipment_items.name: LED Uplight PAR Can
equipment_items.short_description: Color-changing LED uplight for walls and decor.
equipment_items.long_description: Compact RGB LED uplight perfect for washing walls, columns, and backdrops with color. Multiple preset colors and sound-active modes available. Price is per fixture.

equipment_items.name: DJ Multicolor Light Bar
equipment_items.short_description: Sound-activated multi-effect light bar for dance floors.
equipment_items.long_description: All-in-one light bar featuring multiple RGB LED effects, strobe, and chase patterns. Mounts on a stand and responds to music, making it ideal for DJs and dance floors.

equipment_items.name: Gobo Projector Effect Light
equipment_items.short_description: Monogram and logo projector for dance floors and walls.
equipment_items.long_description: Project custom monograms or logos onto dance floors or walls using interchangeable gobos. Great for weddings and corporate branding. Requires a dim environment for best results.

equipment_items.name: Compact 6-Channel Audio Mixer
equipment_items.short_description: Small-format mixer with 2 mic preamps and Bluetooth.
equipment_items.long_description: A lightweight 6-channel mixer featuring two XLR mic inputs, stereo line inputs, basic EQ, and Bluetooth connectivity. Perfect for small bands, speeches, and background music setups.

equipment_items.name: Digital 12-Channel Audio Mixer
equipment_items.short_description: Professional digital mixer with effects and USB recording.
equipment_items.long_description: Feature-rich 12-channel digital mixer with built-in effects, scene recall, and USB multitrack recording. Ideal for full bands, complex corporate events, and productions requiring precise control.

equipment_items.name: Dual Wireless Handheld Mic Set
equipment_items.short_description: Two wireless handheld microphones with receiver.
equipment_items.long_description: UHF wireless microphone system including two handheld mics and a dual-channel receiver. Great for toasts, panels, and Q&A sessions. Works with any standard mixer or PA system.

event_packages.name: Birthday Essentials Party Package
event_packages.short_description: All-in-one birthday party event package for up to 20–25 guests with décor and basic sound.
event_packages.long_description: The Birthday Essentials Party Package is designed for small celebrations at home or in a rented room. It includes themed décor (table covers, balloons, banners), basic audio for music, a dessert table setup, and coordination support for setup and teardown. Ideal for kids or adult birthdays seeking a simple but polished setup.

event_packages.name: Birthday Celebration Plus Package
event_packages.short_description: Upgraded birthday party package for around 25 guests with décor, games, and sound.
event_packages.long_description: The Birthday Celebration Plus Package adds interactive games and enhanced décor to your celebration. Includes themed table décor, balloon garlands, a basic photo backdrop, party games with host instructions, and an upgraded audio system suitable for a living room or small venue.

event_packages.name: Deluxe Birthday Party Package
event_packages.short_description: Deluxe birthday event package for 25–40 guests with premium décor and DJ-style audio.
event_packages.long_description: The Deluxe Birthday Party Package is ideal for milestone birthdays and larger groups. It features premium themed décor, upgraded linens, a larger audio system with microphone for announcements, basic party lighting, and on-site coordination during guest arrival. Perfect for renting a hall or community center.

event_packages.name: Premium Glow Birthday Package
event_packages.short_description: High-energy glow theme birthday package with UV lighting for up to 30 guests.
event_packages.long_description: Transform your venue into a glowing party zone. This package includes glow-in-the-dark décor, UV blacklights, LED uplighting, a party DJ-style audio system, and neon table settings. Ideal for teen and adult birthdays where dancing is the main attraction.

event_packages.name: Classic Wedding Reception Package
event_packages.short_description: Classic wedding reception package with décor, audio, and timeline coordination.
event_packages.long_description: The Classic Wedding Reception Package covers the key elements for a smooth reception: guest table décor, simple head-table staging, cake table styling, background music, and a coordinator to help with timeline cues like toasts and first dances. Designed to pair with banquet halls and community venues.

event_packages.name: Signature All-Inclusive Wedding Package
event_packages.short_description: Full-service wedding planning package with décor, coordination, and production.
event_packages.long_description: A comprehensive wedding solution including ceremony and reception décor, vendor coordination, timeline planning, premium audio and lighting for the dance floor, and an experienced lead planner with an assistant on the wedding day. Ideal for couples who want a single team managing all event details.

event_packages.name: Intimate Micro-Wedding Package
event_packages.short_description: Curated micro-wedding package for up to 30–40 guests.
event_packages.long_description: Perfect for couples planning a small ceremony and reception, this package bundles compact décor, simple ceremony audio, and light coordination. It focuses on meaningful details without the scale of a full ballroom production.

event_packages.name: Half-Day Conference Event Package
event_packages.short_description: Half-day conference event package with A/V, signage, and basic décor.
event_packages.long_description: A streamlined package tailored for morning or afternoon conferences up to four hours. Includes projector and screen, basic PA system, podium microphone, registration table setup, directional signage, and an on-site A/V tech for the duration of the program.

event_packages.name: Full-Day Conference with A/V Package
event_packages.short_description: Turnkey full-day conference package with staging, audio, projection, and on-site support.
event_packages.long_description: This package supports a full-day agenda with plenary sessions and light breakout activity. It includes stage risers, dual projectors, a multi-mic PA system, basic stage lighting, presenter confidence monitor, registration area setup, and an A/V team on site all day.

event_packages.name: Corporate Gala & Awards Night Package
event_packages.short_description: Elegant corporate gala package with décor, staging, and show-style production.
event_packages.long_description: Designed for formal corporate galas and awards nights, this package includes scenic stage décor, premium table linens, centerpieces, walk-up music and show cues, event lighting looks, and producer-level show calling support throughout the evening.

event_packages.name: Backyard BBQ Event Package
event_packages.short_description: Casual backyard BBQ event package with seating, décor, and sound.
event_packages.long_description: Perfect for graduations, family reunions, or casual birthday celebrations, this package bundles picnic-style tables and chairs, checked linens, string lights, and a simple Bluetooth PA system for background music and announcements.

event_packages.name: Kids Fun Day Carnival Package
event_packages.short_description: Family-friendly carnival-style event package with games and décor.
event_packages.long_description: Ideal for school events, community fun days, or large birthday celebrations, this package includes carnival-themed décor, game booths, prize tables, and a basic announcement sound system. Staff support for game setup is also included.

event_packages.name: Evening Cocktail Mixer Package (Retired)
event_packages.short_description: Legacy event package kept for historical bookings only.
event_packages.long_description: A previously offered cocktail mixer package that is no longer bookable. Retained in the system for reporting and past cart references.

event_package_addons.name: Essentials Table Décor (Included)
event_package_addons.description: Basic themed table coverings, centerpiece accents, and banner styling included with the package.

event_package_addons.name: Balloon Décor Upgrade
event_package_addons.description: Upgrade to a fuller balloon décor set with a small balloon arch and additional helium balloons for the cake area.

event_package_addons.name: Enhanced Celebration Décor
event_package_addons.description: Adds layered linens, larger centerpiece items, and a photo-friendly backdrop to the standard décor.

event_package_addons.name: Party Game Host
event_package_addons.description: Staff member to lead party games, manage timing, and coordinate transitions between activities.

event_package_addons.name: Premium Party Décor (Included)
event_package_addons.description: Layered linens, upgraded centerpieces, and themed accent décor included by default in the deluxe package.

event_package_addons.name: DJ Lighting Add-On
event_package_addons.description: Additional moving party lights and color washes for the dance floor area.

event_package_addons.name: Extra UV & Glow Fixtures
event_package_addons.description: Adds additional UV blacklights and LED tubes to intensify the glow effect for larger rooms.

event_package_addons.name: Centerpiece Décor Upgrade
event_package_addons.description: Upgrades standard centerpieces to premium floral or candle-focused designs for guest tables.

event_package_addons.name: Extra Hour of Coordination
event_package_addons.description: Add one additional hour of on-site coordinator presence beyond the standard reception coverage.

event_package_addons.name: Premium Catering Menu Upgrade
event_package_addons.description: Upgrades to a premium plated menu or enhanced buffet with additional entree and dessert selections.

event_package_addons.name: White Resin Chair Upgrade
event_package_addons.description: Swap standard folding chairs for white resin chairs with padded seats for ceremony and reception.

event_package_addons.name: Additional Projector & Screen
event_package_addons.description: Adds a second projector and screen for overflow seating or simultaneous projection of slides and video.

event_package_addons.name: Session Audio Recording Package
event_package_addons.description: Multi-mic audio recording of the main session with basic post-event audio files delivered.

event_package_addons.name: Stage Décor Package
event_package_addons.description: Adds branded scenic elements, step-and-repeat backdrop, and enhanced stage décor for the awards area.

event_package_addons.name: Shade Tent & Sidewall Kit
event_package_addons.description: Pop-up tents with optional sidewalls for food service or guest shade in sunny or light-rain conditions.

event_package_addons.name: Extra Prize Bundle
event_package_addons.description: Additional small prizes and giveaways to support higher guest counts or multiple game rounds.
